action.reasoning: Observation: v7 heuristic degraded to avg safe_steps=11.4 (max 45), very low found_rate=0.017, high avg_dist=6m, 0 success. Test ran in 186s for 5eps (~37s/ep). Config confirmed thresholds (500 safe steps in [1,2)m with |angle|<0.2618rad/15deg). Analysis: recent OA/gain changes caused losing human or over-avoiding, preventing close encounters; previous v4/v5 reached ~50-100 safe steps. Reactive P-controller limited for dynamic random-walking oracle target (no planning). Literature SPF heuristic better but complex; tune reactive further within budget. Root cause: insufficient persistent tracking/speed-matching. Decision: revert to stable v5-like base + tuned gains (angular_k=4.0, linear=clip(1.5*err,-0.6,0.9)), careful depth OA (only strong backup+turn if min_depth<1.0, milder otherwise), detector-boosted follow mode (linear=0.3 when visible+in-range+good-angle), exact success_angle from config for safe count, expanded per-epi diagnostics (min_dist, collisions, detector%). Rewrite FULL non-truncated predict.py + test_full_episode.py (v8), update train.py version note. Run test_full_episode.py for quick validation before submit_eval.
